_note: Generated by generate_config.py — do not edit manually.
_note_ordering: Semantic order for face/mood/tod/quality encodes domain knowledge (calm→aroused, temporal progression). Cannot be derived from data.

messages.overwhelmed|box_breathing: You're carrying a lot. Let's slow your nervous system down with box breathing first.
messages.overwhelmed|rest: Your body and mind need recovery. Rest without guilt — it's productive.
messages.overwhelmed|grounding: Things feel heavy. A quick grounding exercise can bring you back to the present.
messages.restless|box_breathing: There's a buzzing energy that needs settling. A short breath reset will help.
messages.restless|movement: Channel that restless energy into movement before it spirals.
messages.restless|journaling: Writing it out can help you find the thread under the restlessness.
messages.focused|deep_work: You're in a good headspace. Use this window — do your most important task now.
messages.focused|light_planning: Your clarity is an asset. Sketch your priorities while thinking is sharp.
messages.calm|rest: You've found stillness. Honour it — rest is the move right now.
messages.calm|journaling: This calm is a good moment to reflect and capture what's working.
messages.calm|light_planning: A calm mind is a planning mind. Map your next steps gently.
messages.mixed|grounding: Your signals are mixed. Start with grounding to find your centre.
messages.mixed|sound_therapy: Ambient sound can help you find a neutral baseline when things feel blended.
messages.mixed|movement: Physical movement can help untangle the mental mix.
messages.neutral|light_planning: Steady state is a great launchpad. A little structure sets up your day.
messages.neutral|journaling: Neutral can mean unexpressed. Journaling may surface what's sitting below.
messages.neutral|movement: A little movement can nudge you from neutral toward energy.

when_suffix.within_15_min: Try this in the next 15 minutes.
